summary: The diff implements all nine requirements comprehensively. A full-screen white canvas workspace (REQ-1), freehand drawing tool with color/width pickers (REQ-2), all eight shape types with drag/resize (REQ-3), text tool with font size and color (REQ-4), selectable/draggable elements with handles (REQ-5), icon library panel with categories and search (REQ-6), Save as PNG export (REQ-7), undo with Ctrl+Z and toolbar button supporting 20 steps (REQ-8), and a clean neutral-themed UI with sans-serif fonts and tooltips (REQ-9) are all present. The icon library categories are domain-specific rather than the generalist examples suggested, but the spec uses 'e.g.' making this acceptable. No significant missing requirements detected.

hallucinated_features.description: Delete element keyboard shortcut (Delete/Backspace key) for removing selected canvas elements
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention a delete keyboard shortcut for canvas elements. This functionality was added beyond what was specified.
